data.title: Trump Excluded Binance Coin And Litecoin From US Crypto Reserves,  Analysts Say China, CZ's Past And Privacy Concerns Behind The Move
data.description: The establishment of a Strategic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) Reserve and a Digital Asset Stockpile in the U.S. represents a new paradigm in the evolution of cryptocurrencies and one that could influence monetary policy in countries around the world.

data.title: Nothing Launches Phone (3a), (3a) Pro With Flagship Specs Under $500: Shipping Starts March 11, But No Wireless Charging Or IP68 Rating
data.description: Nothing has launched its Phone (3a) and (3a) Pro with flagship-level specs under $500, starting shipments March 11.

data.title: Successful Bitcoin Short Trader Places Take Profit Levels Between $70,000-$74,000: Further Drop Incoming?
data.description: A Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) whale accumulated about $7.5 million in unrealized profit by successfully shorting the apex cryptocurrency amid the ongoing market correction.

data.title: Trump's 'Chaotic' Policies May Drive Investors To Europe, Says Analyst: 'Quite A Shift In The World Order'
data.description: The unpredictable policies of President Donald Trump, especially concerning tariffs and the Russia-Ukraine conflict, have stirred a sense of uncertainty among households, businesses, and Wall Street. However, this has also paved the way for new investment opportunities, as per analysts.

data.title: ServiceNow Q4 Earnings: Revenue Miss, EPS In Line, Still In 'Early Days' Of 'Massive' AI Opportunity (CORRECTED)
data.description: ServiceNow reports fourth-quarter revenue of $2.957 billion, missing the consensus estimate of $92.961 billion. The company reports fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $3.67 per share, in line with analyst estimates, according to Benzinga Pro.
